themeName: Salt & Meadow: A Cottagecore Slow-Sea Journey

visual.aestheticLabel: Salt & Meadow: a linen-botanical quiet-sea mood on Celebrity Silhouette

typographyDirection.headlineStyle: soft serif for big words; quiet, air-spaced tracking; never shouty
typographyDirection.bodyStyle: humanist sans for clarity; restrained weight range; ample line-height
suggestedFonts: Use LLL brand typefaces for UI and primary headlines
Campaign accent serif: Canela or Lyon Display
Campaign body sans: Freight Sans, Suisse/Inter as fallback
System-safe fallback: Georgia for headlines, Arial for body

visual.imageryMood: Ocean-first minimalism with linen and botanical restraintâNordic-quiet, tactile, and calm.
visual.lightingStyle: High-latitude daylight with a matte finish; pearl overcast mid-morning; hushed golden-blue twilight; low contrast, soft shadows.
visual.compositionNotes: Let ship and sea lead: horizon true, Lawn Club grass textures, teak rail, steel and glass. One subtle cue at most (linen sleeve, straw hat, herb sprig, a closed journal). Negative space for breath; shallow human presence angled toward the view rather than the camera. No staged clusters or busy tables; keep it believable and breezy even when nothing âtheme-forwardâ is in-frame.
avoidList: floral arches or styled picnic sprawl
ring lights, tripods, or mic stands
multiple props repeating across the frame
referenceMoodboard: close crop of linen throw on Lawn Club grass with North Atlantic light
teak rail, soft-focus horizon, one straw hat resting by a seat
ceramic teacup with a single herb sprig; sea beyond
pressed-flower postcard on handmade paper beside a pencil; uncluttered
twilight on deckânavy sky, warm interior glow, quiet silhouettes
partial-eclipse crescent light motif referenced as a tiny jewelry/print detail, not a spectacle

plausibilityFramework.governingPrinciple: The niche appears as gentle personal cues layered over normal cruise lifeâif it wouldnât feel natural at a lounger, cafÃ© table, or the rail, it doesnât make the frame.
cruiseNativeMoments: Lawn Club lounging with blankets and horizon-gazing
Slow tea or coffee by a window at CafÃ© al Bacio
Strolls along the open decks in soft Nordic light
Reading or journaling in a quiet corner with sea air
Twilight canapÃ©s on the Lawn; stars when weather allows
Wake-watching from the aft with hands around a warm cup
nicheEnhancedMoments: A single herb sprig tucked by a teacup during sunrise on the Lawn
A linen scarf or straw hat resting on a chair as the ship slides past basalt cliffs
A small, closed journal on a side tableâpencil tuckedâfacing the sea
Pressed-flower postcard kept flat under a book; revealed briefly at a cafÃ© seat
A quiet song shared between friends near the Lawn at twilightâship ambiance first
A modest picnic cloth on the grass with two bites and quiet eye contact, not a spread
implausibleLiteralizations: Any classroom-style craft setup with stations or signage
Foraging or homesteading instruction with tools or outcomes
Sustainability certification or activist panels staged on deck
Large styled picnic vignettes with boards, jars, lanterns, and florals
Easel rows, whiteboards, or mass journaling circles facing a leader
Eclipse âwatch partyâ with PA system, banners, and choreographed moments
allowedProps: slim pocket notebook or postcard with envelope
woven basket used sparingly as a photo accent
discouragedProps: cutting mats, glue guns, spray adhesive, hot irons
knives, shears, or large craft presses
folding tables, carts, signage, table tents
trade-show style displays or product racks

messaging.subSlogan: Linen mornings, Nordic light, and the hush before an eclipse.
messaging.elevatorPitch: A cottagecore slow-sea journey aboard Celebrity Silhouette, timed with a week of high-latitude light and a total solar eclipse. Think lawn-side tea under blankets, a sprig of thyme by your cup, the quiet pleasure of a pressedâflower postcard you brought along, and a pencil resting where the view begins. Nothing scheduled over your vacationâjust gentle cues in familiar ship spaces, a song that fits twilight (often just in one ear), and the freedom to drift between salt air and soft textures as Icelandâs horizons pass by.
messaging.voicePersona: A calm cruise insider with a botanistâs eyeâsoft-spoken, warm, and lightly poetic without fuss.

merch.conceptStatement: Wearable quiet ease with a sea-botanical winkâslogan-led, 1â2 color, water-based inks. Designs favor small chest motifs, horizon lines, and a gentle eclipse cue rather than loud graphics.

merch.logoConceptDescription: Wordmark âSalt & Meadowâ set in a refined serif with a ligatured ampersand; a small lunar dot perches above the ampersand arm. Secondary stacked lockup for square crops. Always subordinate to the LLL master brand on owned channels.
merch.printStyle: Water-based inks, 1-color (occasional 2-color accent), soft hand; front-of-shirt only, print-on-demand ready.

audio.ambientNarrationScript: Salt on the air. Linen over grass. You step into the morning hush, where the Lawn Club meets the North Atlantic light. A teacup warms your hands; a small herb brightens the steam. Pages stay closed until the horizon invites a line or two. Afternoons drift by the railâquiet glances, slow breath, the ship drawing meadow-soft arcs through cold blue water. And then, evening: a gentle guitar somewhere near, silhouettes easing into twilight. This is Salt & Meadowâa week for unhurried textures, Nordic skies, and the simple wonder of day becoming night as the eclipse touches the sea.
audio.hypeClipScript: Soft grass. Linen. A hush before the moon. Salt & Meadow on Celebrity SilhouetteâNordic light, tiny botanical cues, and a slow-sea week that lets the view do the talking. Eclipse on the horizon. Bring your calm.
audio.voiceProfile: Soft alto or androgynous voice, near-field mic, light Nordic-English lilt; warm, breath-friendly delivery; no hard sibilance; intimate, not whispery.
audio.musicMood: Acoustic folk with Nordic ambient undertonesâfingerpicked guitar, harmonium/air pads, light wood percussion; no big drops, just tide-like drift perfect for deck twilight.

tiktokOrganic.hook: When the sea picks the bridge.

narrative.title: Window, Water, One Earbud
narrative.scriptOrNarration: Two people share one earbud by the window. Small smile, then both look back to the wake. On-screen whisper text: âsalt & meadow at seaâ. Natural ship audio under soft guitar.
narrative.visualDirectionNotes: Shoot at CafÃ© al Bacio window, high-latitude daylight. Keep faces three-quarters, horizon true, negative space to the right. Wardrobe: linen sleeve, oatmeal tee; no staged props. No table heroâif a cup is present, keep it soft-focus edge-of-frame.
narrative.backgroundDescription: CafÃ© window overlooking the aft wake; matte daylight, low contrast.
narrative.musicMood: Fingerpicked acoustic with light air-pad; tide-like drift.

tiktokOrganic.caption: A soft seat by the window. One song, two smiles. Salt & Meadow at Sea.

instagramReels.visualConcept: Lawn Club breeze moment: a linen throw lifts and settles on the grass; a straw hat rests nearby. Camera drifts from botanical texture to a calm horizon, then lingers on ship glass and sky. No faces neededâposture is implied by a relaxed ankle crossing into frame.
instagramReels.audioTrackType: Original field sound + gentle fingerpicked guitar
instagramReels.caption: Lawn, linen, low sky. The ship does the styling.

carouselSlides.headline: Salt & Meadow at Sea
carouselSlides.bodyText: Ocean-first. Linen-soft. Nordic hush, carried by the Silhouette.
carouselSlides.visualDescription: True horizon over the Lawn Club at pearl overcast mid-morning; a single straw hat on grass, wide negative space.

carouselSlides.headline: Tea, not a setup
carouselSlides.bodyText: A warm cup, salt air, maybe a tiny herb sprig. Enough.
carouselSlides.visualDescription: Simple ceramic cup by the rail; faint steam; distant coastline out of focus.

carouselSlides.headline: Wardrobe says hush
carouselSlides.bodyText: Oatmeal tee, deep sage letters, a small crescent near the seam.
carouselSlides.visualDescription: Close crop of chest print and cuff; sea glass reflections beyond.

carouselSlides.headline: Twilight breath
carouselSlides.bodyText: Quiet silhouettes and a guitar somewhere near. Let the deck exhale.
carouselSlides.visualDescription: Blue-hour deck; soft interior glow; two figures side-by-side looking seaward.

carouselSlides.headline: Iceland, in passing
carouselSlides.bodyText: Port days can be as easy as a walk to the rail.
carouselSlides.visualDescription: Basalt cliffs and sea birds from shipâs side; teak rail foreground.

carouselSlides.headline: Bring your calm
carouselSlides.bodyText: No schedulesâjust cues, textures, and water.
carouselSlides.visualDescription: A closed pocket notebook on a side table facing the sea; pencil tucked; negative space.

youtubeShort.title: Salt & Meadow on Silhouette | Quiet Sea Week
youtubeShort.visualConcept: 24â28s montage: Lawn Club grass in matte daylight; window seat with shared glance; straw hat resting by teak; twilight silhouettes; final beat hints a tiny crescent detail on a cuff, then horizon.
youtubeShort.description: Ocean-first minimalism with linen and botanical restraint aboard Celebrity Silhouette. A calm, cottagecore-leaning sea week timed with high-latitude light and an eclipse on the horizon. Soft mornings, salt air.

pinterest.pinDescription: A soft-sea moment aboard Celebrity Silhouetteâlinen, a quiet cup, and a horizon that does the talking. Salt & Meadow at Sea.

emailHeader.subjectLine: Salt & Meadow at Sea â linen mornings, Nordic light
emailHeader.preheader: A calm, botanical-leaning week aboard Celebrity Silhouette; eclipse on the horizon.
emailHeader.bodyDirection: Write like a postcard: three short lines inviting a slow-sea mood. Ocean-first, no schedule language. End with a soft CTA: âGet softâsea updates.â
emailHeader.visualDirection: Hero: true horizon over Lawn Club with negative space. Serif headline in Canela; body in light humanist sans. Palette: deep sage on warm background; tiny crescent detail near the lockup.

discordBanner.serverBannerDescription: Blue-hour deck horizon with warm interior glow; faint crescent detail near a corner; minimal wordmark. Space to breatheâsea first.
discordBanner.welcomeMessageDirection: Warm, unhurried welcome. Invite window photos, sea-sound shares, and calm check-ins. Keep tone kind and open; no tiers or roles talkâjust soft companionship at sea.

heroExplainer.title: Salt & Meadow at Sea â A Quiet-Blue Week on Silhouette
heroExplainer.scriptOrNarration: Salt on the air. Linen over grass. Morning hush where the Lawn meets the North Atlantic light. Hands around a warm cup; pages stay closed until the horizon invites a line or two. Afternoons by the railâshared glances, slow breath, water drawing meadow-soft arcs. And evening: a gentle guitar somewhere near as day leans toward night. Salt & Meadow on Celebrity Silhouetteâunhurried textures, Nordic skies, and a small wonder on the horizon.
heroExplainer.visualDirectionNotes: Ocean-first shots: Lawn Club textures, teak rail, glass and sky; wardrobe cues (oatmeal tee, linen scarf), no staged clusters. Include two-person chemistry beats without front-facing cameras. A single herb sprig appears once only, not hero. Brief eclipse-crescent jewelry detail; no spectacle.
heroExplainer.backgroundDescription: CafÃ© al Bacio window seat, open decks, Lawn Club, aft wake; occasional Icelandic coastline in soft focus.
heroExplainer.musicMood: Fingerpicked acoustic + airy pads; no drops, tide-like pacing.
